---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement for agent-assembly
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["✨ enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

> No Jira ticket required — the `AAASM` tracker is private. Just file this issue;
> a maintainer will create and link an `AAASM` tracking ticket during triage.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve, or what value does it add?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you rule them out?

## Acceptance Criteria

How will we know this feature is complete and correct?

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Additional Context

Links to related issues, prior art, specifications, or design documents.
